title: derris sericea
intro: Derris sericea, also known as the velvet bean or silky derris, is a perennial plant native to tropical Asia and Australia, belonging to the legume family. The plant's roots contain rotenone, a compound with medicinal properties that exhibit insecticidal and antiseptic properties, making it effective against various health issues. The medicinal properties of Derris sericea have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, with the health benefits including the reduction of inflammation and the promotion of wound healing. The herbal preparations of Derris sericea can be made into teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
